name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy south Indian crepe stuffed with spiced potato masala, served with sambar and chutneys.

name: Continental Breakfast Platter
description: Toasted sliced bread, organic butter, jam, eggs of your choice, fresh fruit juice, and warm tea/coffee.

name: Paneer Butter Masala with Naan
description: Rich, velvety cottage cheese tomato gravy served with 2 freshly made tandoori butter naans.

name: Aromatic Chicken Biryani
description: Authentic dum biryani prepared with layered fragrant basmati rice, tender chicken, and spices, served with raita.

name: Slow-Cooked Dal Makhani & Rice
description: Creamy whole black lentils slow-cooked overnight with ghee and spices, paired with hot steamed cumin rice.

name: Zesty Fresh Lime Soda
description: Chilled sparkling refreshment with your choice of sweet, salted, or mixed lime flavor.

name: Traditional Masala Tea
description: Freshly brewed strong Indian tea flavored with ginger, cardamom, and aromatic spices.

name: Gulab Jamun (2pcs)
description: Golden fried soft milk dumplings soaked in a warm, sweet, cardamom-infused sugar syrup.
